name: arsenal-code
description: Smart prompt router for AI coding assistants — auto-classifies tasks as Vanilla (direct), Scout (research), or Arsenal (full power) to optimize token usage and maximize productivity. Supports Claude Code, VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Codex, and more.
author: Muhammad Talha Javed <talha@aivico.app>

claude-plugin.name: arsenal-code
claude-plugin.description: Auto-classifies prompts → Vanilla / Scout / Arsenal mode to optimize token usage
